_description: Canonical enumeration of `#log/*` and `#status/*` system-utility tag subtype values. Source of truth for the pre-write-guard hook's near-match DENY discipline (R-05) and the librarian log-subtype-canonical audit. Foundation seeds the operational subtypes that ship with foundation skills + crons; adopters extend via Layer 3 overlay at `log_subtype_registry_overlay.json` (sibling location post-install).

_design_notes.consumer: pre-write-guard.sh tag-validation branch (R-05 near-match DENY); librarian log-subtype-canonical capability (audit-time drift detection); skill-side `log_subtype:` SKILL.md declaration contract
_design_notes.evolution_protocol: R-37 atomic lockstep — registry additions require updating tagging-rules.json R-05 + the capability spec + the schema's _tag_prefixes_meta + this registry in one commit. Adopter-side additions land at log_subtype_registry_overlay.json (Layer 3); no foundation-repo commit required for adopter operational subtypes.

log_subtypes.description: End-of-session reconciliation artifacts emitted by the session-close skill or its manual invocation. One file per session.
Auto-emitted session-close artifacts produced by lifecycle hooks when an interactive session ends without an explicit close invocation.
Error artifacts emitted by cron wrappers on non-zero exit. One file per failure; preserves stderr + invocation context.
Librarian audit-capability output (governance-parity-audit, packet-staleness-audit, archetype-consistency, etc.).
Output emitted by the log-archive librarian capability. Documents which files were rotated to Archive/Logs/.
Build-progress logs emitted during plan execution (foundation-repo install, scaffold rendering, capability deploy).
Documentation-emission logs (capability docs rendered, narrative spokes generated, ADRs authored).
Backlog-hygiene capability output. Surfaces stale items, lifecycle timeouts, auto-archive candidates.
Per-plan backlog progress files at Logs/backlog-progress/<plan-slug>.md. Single source of session history per plan; backlog row carries only current-state pointer.
Digest pipeline run output (calendar + chat + meeting synthesis). Daily cadence typical.
Inventory-walk outputs (vault filesystem inventory, manifest regeneration runs, packet-coverage scans).

status_subtypes.description: Marks a file as processed by the appropriate pipeline (meeting-processor, inbox-archive, etc.). The frontmatter `processed:` boolean is canonical; the tag mirrors it for graph-view filterability.
Flagged for operator review. Used on auto-emitted content that needs a triage gate.
Engagement, project, or initiative is currently in-flight.
Strategic-tier artifact has been promoted out of exploratory state into operational use.
Closed-lifecycle artifact preserved for historical reference but not actively maintained.
